topic: 阻力训练对老年人肌肉力量的影响

pico.intervention_or_exposure: resistance training strength training weight training
pico.study_design_preference: RCT / systematic review / meta-analysis / clinical trial

searches.query: ("resistance training"[Title/Abstract] OR "strength training"[Title/Abstract] OR "weight training"[Title/Abstract]) AND ("muscle strength"[Title/Abstract] OR "strength"[Title/Abstract] OR "force"[Title/Abstract]) AND ("elderly"[Title/Abstract] OR "older adults"[Title/Abstract] OR "aged"[Title/Abstract] OR "senior"[Title/Abstract]) AND (randomized controlled trial[Publication Type] OR controlled clinical trial[Publication Type]) NOT (animal[Title/Abstract] OR rat[Title/Abstract] OR mouse[Title/Abstract] OR cell[Title/Abstract] OR "in vitro"[Title/Abstract])
